caption: An elderly man with grey hair and glasses speaks from behind a wooden podium in a room with brown horizontal blinds in the background. He wears a light blue patterned short-sleeved shirt with a decorative collar. A microphone is positioned in front of him as he looks down at notes on the podium and then looks forward toward the audience. The podium features a logo with a red and yellow sunburst design and the word "CINEMA" underneath. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible as they listen to the speaker. On the right side of the scene, a white rectangular box contains the text "ORCA". Across the sequence of frames, the man shifts his gaze from his notes to the audience and slightly adjusts his posture while continuing to speak.
